<!--
PR title convention for clean Creative Work Tool import:
    [creative] <deliverable type>: <short title>

Examples:
    [creative] Code Contribution: NSO service v2 templates
    [creative] Design Document: Cisco AI Playbook MCP architecture

The Creative Work Tool's "Import from GitHub" dialog shows the PR title
verbatim. A consistent prefix makes batch-ticking trivial each month.
-->
